title: Career Opportunity Logistics Manager at Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Logistics Manager at Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Logistics Manager at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates:
Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates!
